summary: I'm Jamie—a curious, people-loving (97% extrovert!) Organizational Development & Workplace Experience professional who thrives on solving problems through data analysis, developing programs grounded in insights, and collaborating with stakeholders for sustainable impact. Expect me to always be seeking ways we can improve the people development and workplace experience—through human-centered, systematic approaches.

bullets.text: Upskill HR team in data analysis to audit 300+ leave cases, successfully refuting cost assumptions via evidence-based insights
Empower HR to present executive-ready insights on $362K in leave costs, leading to policy redesigns and first aid training
Manage end-to-end lifecycles for 20+ projects, utilizing feedback loops to optimize operational strategies and vendor performance
bullets.original: Conduct needs assessments with 25+ global stakeholders to identify learning gaps and design 3 new educational programs
bullets.reason: JD: 'coordinate complex logistics and operations' — lifecycle ownership framing

bullets.text: Establish cross-functional processes and documentation for 70+ staff, streamlining operations and reducing onboarding time by 75%
bullets.original: Develop guides and workflows for 70+ cross-functional staff, improving program knowledge and reducing onboarding time by 75%

bullets.text: Facilitate training webinars for 600+ participants, boosting program engagement and achieving a 78% program enrollment rate
bullets.reason: WX is internal — 'program enrollment' not sales language

bullets.text: Conduct needs assessments and analyze feedback from 25+ global stakeholders to inform program design and strategy
bullets.original: Manage 20+ programs and 10+ vendors, refining program positioning, delivery strategy, and operations via feedback analysis
bullets.reason: Analytical framing fits WX; 'positioning' is commercial

bullets.text: Analyzed 2,000+ employee experiences to amplify employee voice and guide C-suite decisions on satisfaction drivers
bullets.reason: Data analysis is a core JD ask — lead with strongest evidence

bullets.text: Improved employee experience via 5 cross-functional projects focusing on survey development, rewards & recognition, and L&D
bullets.reason: 'Employee experience' is in the job title

bullets.text: Led a manager effectiveness initiative, transforming feedback data into actionable reports that informed engagement strategies
bullets.reason: Still strong but secondary to EX and data

bullets.text: Provided consultations to improve strategic plans and internal training on DEI, Inclusive Leadership, and performance review
Strengthened employee engagement via an HR newsletter and award-winning well-being initiatives, recognized among 1,000+ competitors
bullets.reason: Best EX/culture bullet — core WX match

bullets.text: Initiated a DEI pilot with an Inclusive Leadership workshop for 12 senior leaders, later expanded to 23 other global locations
bullets.reason: Culture programs are core WX work

bullets.text: Optimized onboarding processes across 3 global locations by coordinating process analysis and clarifying job responsibilities
Facilitated smooth organizational change by coordinating a Mergers & Acquisitions project and overseeing cross-functional stakeholders
bullets.reason: M&A context is distracting for WX

bullets.text: Developed proficiency across various HR functions, ranging from recruitment and compensation to performance management
Filled a challenging international role by drafting job descriptions, posting openings, and researching global compensation details
Engaged global talent via personalized communication and customer service, increasing applications by 566% in 2 months
Organized recruiting events and moderated panels with C-suite at top 3 universities, reaching 230+ students and 80+ applicants

sections.title: About Superhuman
sections.content: Superhuman is the AI-native communication platform. Superhuman is redefining work through AI-powered productivity solutions. As part of the Early Career Program, team members are matched to roles based on preferences, skills, and where they will thrive.

sections.title: Role: Workplace Experience Coordinator
sections.content: → Summary: Added "Workplace Experience" to identity label for direct ATS title match This is not a rotational program. Team members in this role must be based in the San Francisco Bay Area and collaborate in person.

items.reason:
InGenius #1: swapped to lifecycle/operations framing
→ Vestas #3: "conducting" → "coordinating" to mirror this verb

InGenius #2: "Establish cross-functional processes" maps to process improvement
→ Vestas #4: "directing" → "coordinating" for collaboration language
InGenius #3: internal framing ("program enrollment" not "client conversion")
Skills: Added Google Workspace + Notion (required tools)

items.text: Strong written and verbal communication skills

items.reason:
Trans. Projects: "analytics" → "analysis" for exact match
→ NextGen reorder: 2,000+ employee analysis leads first
→ InGenius #4: analytical framing for needs assessment

NextGen #4→2: EX project surfaced second
→ Vestas #4→1: EX/culture bullet leads
→ Vestas word: "engagement" → "employee engagement"

sections.title: Compensation
sections.content: $80,000 – $110,000 base salary + equity + benefits. San Francisco Bay Area, in-person.

sections.content: ✅ Confirmed sponsor — Superhuman (via Grammarly) files H1B regularly per LCA records.
